nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God, “This shall be the boundary by which you shall divide the land for an inheritance among the twelve tribes of Israel; Joseph shall have two portions.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God: “This is the boundary by which you shall divide the land for inheritance among the twelve tribes of Israel. Joseph shall have two portions.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說：“你們按著以色列十二支派分地為業，要照著這些地界：約瑟要得雙份。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说：“你要按照我划定的地界，把土地分给以色列的十二支派作产业，除约瑟支派要得两份地业外，
